items.title: One more thing: A big thank you to Kevin Love, Jack Sikma, Al Horford and Brook Lopez for sharing their stories with me. Could almost write another column with the stuff I couldn't fit into this one.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt:
One more thing: A big thank you to Kevin Love, Jack Sikma, Al Horford and Brook Lopez for sharing their stories with me. Could almost write another column with the stuff I couldn't fit into this one.

media.title: How NBA big men evolved from post players to shooters and playmakers beyond the paint (Gift Article)
media.description: In recent decades, big men have grown increasingly comfortable with scoring away from the hoop. Who were most vital to the evolution?
